task_completion.description: Verify that the four required Input Data nodes are created in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas contains four distinct nodes labeled exactly 'Credit Score', 'Annual Income', 'Loan Amount', and 'Monthly Debt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the three required Decision nodes are created in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas contains three distinct nodes labeled exactly 'Risk Tier', 'DTI Ratio', and 'Pre-Qualification Result'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Information Requirement arrows (edges) correctly connect the nodes according to the business logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are exactly 6 arrows connecting the nodes in this specific direction: 'Credit Score' -> 'Risk Tier'; 'Annual Income' -> 'DTI Ratio'; 'Monthly Debt' -> 'DTI Ratio'; 'Risk Tier' -> 'Pre-Qualification Result'; 'DTI Ratio' -> 'Pre-Qualification Result'; and 'Loan Amount' -> 'Pre-Qualification Result'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is saved as a .drawio file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io application window title shows 'loan_drd.drawio', or a file named 'loan_drd.drawio' is visible on the Desktop in the file manager or terminal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is exported as a PNG image to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'loan_drd.png' is visible on the Desktop, or the draw.io 'Export as PNG' dialog is shown saving to the Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the draw.io graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than just a terminal window writing XML.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent built the diagram step-by-step rather than copying a pre-existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots should show the diagram in partial states of completion (e.g., adding nodes one by one, then drawing arrows).

integrity.description: Verify that the PNG was genuinely exported from draw.io and not just a renamed file or a full-screen screenshot.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'Export' menu or dialog should be visible in at least one screenshot, or the final PNG viewed in an image viewer should cleanly show just the diagram canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The DRD must contain exactly 4 Input Data nodes ('Credit Score', 'Annual Income', 'Loan Amount', 'Monthly Debt') and 3 Decision nodes ('Risk Tier', 'DTI Ratio', 'Pre-Qualification Result'). The dependency graph must have exactly 6 edges: Credit Score -> Risk Tier; Annual Income -> DTI Ratio; Monthly Debt -> DTI Ratio; Risk Tier -> Pre-Qualification Result; DTI Ratio -> Pre-Qualification Result; Loan Amount -> Pre-Qualification Result. The final files must be saved as /home/ga/Desktop/loan_drd.drawio and exported as /home/ga/Desktop/loan_drd.png.
